text: For purposes of this chapter, “citation” means a notice to appear, notice of violation, or notice of parking violation.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 7. Arrest Quotas [41600 - 41603]
##### § 41601

For purposes of this chapter, “citation” means a notice to appear, notice of violation, or notice of parking violation.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1111.)*

subsections.text: For purposes of this chapter, “citation” means a notice to appear, notice of violation, or notice of parking violation.
